title: chrysogonum australe
intro: Chrysogonum australe, also known as Green Adder's Mouth, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Chrysogonum australe is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
